note: accuracy_score (LLM judge, 0–100) is the primary metric. rouge_l_f1 is a coarse lexical secondary signal only.
interpretation: Dry-run used a constant placeholder judge score for every pair, so the correct-vs-mismatched gap is ~0 by construction. This does not validate the metric — re-run without --dry-run (and with ≥2 test emails) to check that the LLM judge discriminates.
